creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sbruno (src committer)
Date: Sat Jan 11 16:15:59 2014
New Revision: 339434
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/339434

Log:
  Put back NO_STAGE that was removed in svn r338393.
  
  PR:		 ports/185597

Modified:
  head/audio/clementine-player/Makefile

Modified: head/audio/clementine-player/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/clementine-player/Makefile	Sat Jan 11 16:12:42 2014	(r339433)
+++ head/audio/clementine-player/Makefile	Sat Jan 11 16:15:59 2014	(r339434)
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	clementine
 PORTVERSION=	1.2.1
-PORTREVISION=	4
+PORTREVISION=	5
 CATEGORIES=	audio
 MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-player
@@ -28,6 +28,7 @@ LATEST_LINK=	${PORTNAME}${PKGNAMESUFFIX}
 PROJECTHOST=	${PORTNAME}${PKGNAMESUFFIX}
 
 USES=		compiler:c++11-lib cmake pkgconfig
+NO_STAGE=	yes
 USE_GL=		glew
 USE_QT4=	dbus gui xml qmake_build uic_build moc_build rcc_build \
 		linguist_build network sql opengl qtestlib corelib webkit \
